\tzpentry{ID5649}{Curvature Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5649 introduces Curvature Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} R(r,t)=\left|\frac{1}{N(r)}\sum_{i\in \mathcal{A}(r)} e^{i\phi_i(t)}\right|. \end{equation}
